prompt: Build a single-slide IBM Carbon deck called 'strategic-impact.pptx'. The slide shows 4 compounding value cards in a horizontal row. Each card has: a gradient accent bar at the top (with borderRadius for rounded cards), a step number ('01', '02', '03', '04'), a gradient hero title rendered as SVG→PNG (e.g., 'Establish', 'Enable', 'Accelerate', 'Scale'), a subtitle, a divider line, 4 bullet items, another divider, and outcome text. Cards use ROUNDED_RECTANGLE with per-card tinted backgrounds. FaArrowRight connectors between cards. Include a bottom callout bar with rich text. Use a pixel-to-inch conversion helper.

assertions.text: Output file strategic-impact.pptx exists and is valid
Uses renderGradientTitle to render gradient hero text as SVG→PNG
Uses ROUNDED_RECTANGLE (not plain RECTANGLE) for card backgrounds
Each card has a unique tinted background color (not all gray10)
renderGradientBar called with borderRadius > 0 for rounded card accent bars
Uses LINE shapes for dividers inside cards
FaArrowRight icons between cards (3 arrows for 4 cards)
Slide header title and subtitle do not visually overlap (title.y + title.h <= subtitle.y)
